item.name: Authentic Starlight Log Set
item.description:
Fortunately, this faithful reproduction of a festive log-shaped cake tastes nothing like its appearance would suggest.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Piety Bonus: +4% (Max 7)
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 8)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
